events.name: colonist_conflict
events.description: Accusations of resource hoarding fracture the colony trust.

events.name: alien_signal
events.description: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.

events.name: phobos_transit
events.description: Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))

governance.rationale: Appoint a strong leader to guide us through crisis.

meta_awareness.insight: Grove Ash asks: 'If I am a LisPy data structure, can I rewrite myself?'
Pax Stone dreams of a vast interpreter evaluating their every choice.
Opal Creek whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'

memories.event: A bitter dispute over food rationing escalates to shouting.
Greenhouse dome seal breach — crops exposed to vacuum.
Earth sends updated colony charter with governance suggestions.
Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Fine Martian regolith clogs air filters and reduces solar output.
A bitter dispute over food rationing escalates to shouting.
Underground cavern with stable temperature discovered.
Double shadow: Phobos and Deimos transit simultaneously.
Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
Ice deposits discovered beneath the eastern ridge.
Regolith dust causes chronic respiratory inflammation.
Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.
Fine Martian regolith clogs air filters and reduces solar output.
Unknown pathogen spreads through the water system.
The primary water recycler fails catastrophically.

Lava tube entrance found — potential expansion space.
A rich vein of iron oxide uncovered during excavation.
A bitter dispute over food rationing escalates to shouting.
Accusations of resource hoarding fracture the colony trust.
Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
